hero.title: Building Your Vision with
hero.description: From concept to completion, Ecobus Construction delivers exceptional commercial and residential construction services. We transform your ideas into reality.

services.title: Services Offered by Ecobus
services.description: Multidisciplinary expertise at the service of your construction, development, and technical supply projects.

items.title: Construction and Public Works
items.description: Public and private sector: roads, bridges and urban developments carried out with excellence.

items.title: Buildings and Infrastructure
items.description: Realization of administrative, school, health infrastructure and sports complexes.

items.title: Individual Houses
items.description: Design and construction of dream homes for individuals with premium finishes.

items.title: Technical Studies and Expertise
items.description: In-depth studies and technical expertise of infrastructure for maximum safety.

items.title: Design, Monitoring and Control
items.description: Complete project management, from initial design to rigorous monitoring of works.

items.title: Import and Materials
items.description: Import and marketing of construction materials and state-of-the-art equipment.

items.title: Supply of Equipment
items.description: Office, IT, consumables and technical construction equipment supply.

items.title: Vehicles and Machinery
items.description: Supply of vehicles, construction machinery and high-performance generators.

items.title: Project Management Consulting
items.description: Technical services and strategic advice to optimize the management of your projects.

items.title: Technical Assistance
items.description: Personalized technical accompaniment and assistance to project owners.

items.title: Rental and Real Estate
items.description: Rental of vehicles, warehouses, offices and houses for residential use.

about.title: Building Excellence Since 1999
about.description: For over two decades, Ecobus Construction has been the trusted partner for commercial and residential construction projects across the region.
about.team: Our team of 150+ skilled professionals brings expertise, dedication, and innovation to every project we undertake.
about.values: We believe that exceptional construction is built on a foundation of trust, quality, and clear communication.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: Explore our diverse portfolio of completed projects showcasing our commitment to excellence.

process.title: Our Proven Process
process.description: A streamlined approach that ensures transparency, quality, and successful project delivery.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We start with a detailed consultation to understand your vision, requirements, and budget.

steps.title: Design & Planning
steps.description: Our design team creates detailed plans and 3D visualizations to ensure a smooth build process.

steps.title: Construction
steps.description: Expert execution with regular progress updates and quality checkpoints.

steps.title: Completion
steps.description: Thorough final inspection to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

contact.title: Start Your Project Today
contact.description: Ready to bring your construction project to life? Contact us for a free consultation.

form.title: Request a Quote
form.description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
form.detailsPlaceholder: Tell us about your project, timeline, and any specific requirements...
form.successMessage: We've received your message and will be in touch shortly.

gallery.description: Explore our latest construction works and ongoing projects from across our portfolio.

articles.description: Insights, industry news, and expert tips from our team of seasoned professionals.
